articles.title: Three die in Royal Navy helicopter crash during training exercise
articles.description: The Ministry of Defence says an investigation into the crash is under way.

articles.title: PM accuses Farage of exploiting Nowak case and denies 'two-tier policing' claim
articles.description: It comes after the Reform UK leader said the public should respond with "pure, cold rage" to the actions of police.

articles.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
articles.description: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

articles.title: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
articles.description: Iran says the attack on Kuwait was in retaliation for earlier US strikes on an Iranian oil tanker and island.
